stemHtml: A commercial organisation invests heavily in new technology solely to reduce a hazard that has a safety risk index of "acceptable". According to ICAO Doc 9859, what is the probable outcome?

options.a: The organisation will significantly increase its safety level, attracting more customers, and could increase profits.
options.b: The cost can reduce profits with minimal safety improvements, and could lead to bankruptcy.
options.c: The "safety space" of the organisation will be significantly improved.
options.d: The risk index for this individual hazard will rise.
